programme.title: Sporting Cristal (PER) vs Cerro Porteño (PAR) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.desc: Live and exclusive coverage from South American of the Copa Sudamericana.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Stories From The Cities | E9 Guadalajara
programme.desc: 16-Episode Series offering a cinematic exploration of the "soccer soul" of each FIFA World Cup 2026 host city. Uncover the cultural, grassroots, and community dimensions of football across North America.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Bologna vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid have won three of their last seven games at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano against FC Barcelona in all competitions, including a 4-0 victory in February 2026 in the Copa del Rey during the Blaugrana's last visit, which was their biggest home win against them since April 1989. FC Barcelona have won their last three away games against Atlético de Madrid in LaLiga, becoming the only visiting team to achieve three consecutive victories in the competition at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano.

programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2025/26 Ep.45 - Victor Moses
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

programme.title: One Friday Fights -150
programme.desc: Staged at Lumpinee Stadium in Bangkok on 10 April, OFF150 features nine bouts across Muay Thai, MMA and kickboxing. In the main event, strawweight Muay Thai sees Kompet Sitsarawatsuer face Attachai Kelasport, while the co-main event pits Rambong Sor Therapat against Pethuahin Jitmuangnon in flyweight Muay Thai.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Wolverhampton Wanderers - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches. Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2025/26 Ep.45 - Victor Moses
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. Only Paris SG have eliminated Barcelona more times in the knockout stages of the European Cup/Champions League.

programme.title: ONE Fight Night - 42
programme.desc: ONE Fight Night 42 at Lumpinee Stadium in Bangkok features 8 bouts across Muay Thai, MMA and submission grappling. In the main event, welterweight MMA sees Chase Mann face Dzhabir Dzhabrailov. The card also includes Sam-A vs Elmehdi El Jamari in strawweight Muay Thai, plus Dante Leon vs Kenta Iwamoto in welterweight submission grappling.

programme.title: Rayo Vallecano vs AEK Athens - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Porto vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 1
programme.desc: Hazalqoum and Al Kabeer meet their lazy Sudanese brother Naeem. At first, Al Kabeer did not accept Naeem as his brother, until the latter tells him that he wants to share their father’s inheritance.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 2
programme.desc: Al Kabeer comes to an agreement about how much money he will receive when he and his brothers forfeit their share of the Turkish pharmaceutical company. Two thieves follow him when he leaves with his money.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 3
programme.desc: When Al Kabeer wakes up with no memories, the nurse assures him that she will take care of him until they discover who he is. Meanwhile, Hazalqoum reaches Turkey and asks his friend and mob boss to help him find his brother.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 4
programme.desc: Al Kabeer studies the Turkish language and later, he hears ruckus from the apartment next door. When he goes to check it out, he finds a girl on the verge of committing suicide.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 5
programme.desc: Hazalqoum’s assistant discovers that there is a mole among them who was involved in Yuri’s death. Elsewhere, Al Kabeer seems to be infatuated with his neighbour.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 6
programme.desc: Al Kabeer begins working as a janitor in Baba Doublas’s boxing gym where he trains after hours. Later, when Baba Doublas confirms that Al Kabeer’s accent is Egyptian, the latter’s neighbour suggests that they visit the Egyptian embassy.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 7
programme.desc: Sasha’s wife is infatuated with Hazalqoum, who gives her his phone number. Elsewhere, a boxing champion heckles Al Kabeer as he cleans the gym.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 8
programme.desc: When Sarouf Beik, a mob boss in Turkey, discovers that Al Kabeer is in a relationship with his daughter, he orders his men to stop helping him. Later, they interrupt Al Kabeer while he is out with his girlfriend.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 9
programme.desc: Al Kabeer fights with many boxers and wins while Johnny calls Hazalqoum and asks for updates about Al Kabeer.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 10
programme.desc: Al Kabeer and Hazalqoum get minor injuries when they face each other and later, Sasha tries to convince Al Kabeer to turn Sarouf Beik in.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 11
programme.desc: Al Kabeer marries Lutfi’s daughter and they fall off the radar, however, Lutfi finds him and asks him to work for him again.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 12
programme.desc: Al Kabeer trains in Baba Doublas’s gym for his fight with Roman and later, the boxers face each other in front of an audience that includes his wife, Baba Doublas and Lutfi.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 13
programme.desc: Sasha and Hazalqoum barge into the boxing arena and defeat Lutfi and his gang. During the altercation, Al Kabeer falls on the floor, hits his head and something unexpected happens.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 14
programme.desc: Johnny and Hagras stay at a hotel where they get into a lot of trouble when they harass a married woman and later hit a golf ball into one of the rooms.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 15
programme.desc: Johnny is sentenced to prison and hard labour, and stripped of all his possessions. Later, Johnny is cordially received in prison.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 16
programme.desc: Johnny changes his name to Buri and befriends one of the prisoners. Later, he causes trouble in prison and gets locked up in solitary confinement.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 17
programme.desc: After being caught red-handed, Al Kabeer goes to prison while Johnny gets rewarded for his efficiency and hard work. Later, Hazalqoum visits Al Kabeer in prison and they devise a plan to help him and Johnny escape.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 18
programme.desc: Hazalqoum and Ashraf scheme to get the latter to enter prison. Meanwhile, Johnny and Al Kabeer plan to steal the officer’s key.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 19
programme.desc: In an attempt to help Al Kabeer escape, Hazalqoum sends Hajras, Baazaq and Dr. Rabee to prison for theft. But every time they try to escape, they get caught.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 20
programme.desc: Al Kabeer, Ashraf, Hajras, Baazaq and Rabee perform the play Hamlet onstage in prison in hopes of making a successful escape attempt.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 21
programme.desc: Karam and Al Kabeer go undercover as policemen to escape from prison. Later, the owner of the lair where Al Kabeer was caught appears in prison.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 22
programme.desc: Hajras opens a grocery shop and advises Johnny to resume his acting career. Johnny asks Hazalqoum to produce a new movie and is surprised to learn that he is already investing his money in the movies.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 23
programme.desc: Hazalqoum decides to use Al Kabeer’s villa as a shooting set but when he refuses, Ashraf tries to manipulate Al Kabeer by suggesting that he travel abroad to perform Umrah. Meanwhile, Johnny is eager to know who the main female character is.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 24
programme.desc: Johnny is shocked at how bad the performance of the main female character Noor is. Later, Hazalqoum and Noor celebrate together before shooting their new film.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 25
programme.desc: While shooting the first scene of the movie, Al Kabeer’s unexpected arrival causes a frenzy of fear and everyone flees the villa. Later, Noor asks Al Kabeer to star in the movie with her instead of Johnny.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 26
programme.desc: A rush of panic engulfs everyone when they hear that a meteor will hit Cairo, and that it consists of an unknown substance. When a team of scientists learn that Hazalqoum is the only one who did a research on the substance, they seek his help.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 27
programme.desc: Egyptian astronaut Mamdouh meets Hazalqoum’s team, which has been chosen to carry out the mission of destroying the meteor. The members undergo medical and psychological tests and prepare to mount the space shuttle.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 27
programme.desc: Egyptian astronaut Mamdouh meets Hazalqoum’s team, which has been chosen to carry out the mission of destroying the meteor. The members undergo medical and psychological tests and prepare to mount the space shuttle.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 28
programme.desc: When Hazalqoum and his team land on the meteor, they lose connection with Earth, and decide to send nuclear missiles to detonate the meteor.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 29
programme.desc: Hazalqoum and Mamdouh quarrel over how to destroy the meteor. Later, while Mamdouh tries to reconnect with Earth, Ali realizes that the space shuttle has been severely damaged.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Season 5 Episode 30
programme.desc: Finale

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 1
programme.desc: In the absence of his wife, Al Kabeer’s state worsens when he gets busy taking care of his twins and neglects his duties as a village chief.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 2
programme.desc: Al Kabeer’s problems intensify when his son consumes a dosage of Doctor Rabee’s invention that turns him into a giant.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 3
programme.desc: Al Kabeer’s aunt returns after hearing that the family’s chiefdom may be revoked. The aunt sets a condition on Al Kabeer to return to his job.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 4
programme.desc: The aunt picks a wife for Al Kabeer, who begins to feel pressured by the changes in his life. A new condition is set by the aunt on Al Kabeer’s marriage.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 5
programme.desc: Al Kabeer seeks to find love again after his wife was gone, unaware that what he is looking for is closer than he imagines.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 6
programme.desc: Al Kabeer seeks to find love again after his wife was gone, unaware that what he is looking for is closer than he imagines.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 7
programme.desc: Al Kabeer and his family are kidnapped and brought to an unknown site. Meanwhile, they are forced to participate in a game of Alexandria’s statues.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 8
programme.desc: Tensions intensify as Al Kabeer, his family, and the people of Mazareeta work hard to free themselves. The contests at the abduction sites remain on-going.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 9
programme.desc: After three days have passed since the kidnapping of Al Kabeer and Mazareeta’s people, others participate in a competition with ropes and odd even games.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 10
programme.desc: While Kabeer and his family attempt to escape, the kidnapper’s identity is revealed. Al Kabeer discovers that the abduction was part of a game.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 11
programme.desc: Al Kabeer's brother surprises him in a visit, seeking Al Kabeer's help in finding his son's mother.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 12
programme.desc: Hazalqoum visits his many wives in search of his son’s mother, starting with weightlifting Amino and educated Amjad. Halqoum spends time with Al Kabeer’s kids.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 13
programme.desc: Al Kabeer discovers that multiple items were stolen from him and are being set for sale. Intent on fulfilling his task, Hazalqoum goes to his ex-wife, Nermine.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 14
programme.desc: Al Atra feigns sickness to escape his bullies at school, but Al Kabeer gets involved and attempts to put a stop to all types of bullying.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 15
programme.desc: Johnny and Hagras try to go viral on social media by making a video with Nafadi as an extra.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 16
programme.desc: People around the village become more and more obsessed with social media. Al Kabeer’s content of choice makes Marbouha jealous while Hagras betrays Johnny.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 17
programme.desc: The social media feud between Johnny and Hagras grows dangerously. Marbouha resorts to wearing bold fashion to get Al Kabeer’s attention.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 18
programme.desc: Desperate to overcome Hagras, Johnny decides to buy social media followers and asks Al Kabeer for money, but the request is met with a violent reaction.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 19
programme.desc: Al Kabeer’s mother visits Marbouha and makes a scene when she’s denied entry into the gentlemen’s club.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 20
programme.desc: Hagras tries to talk Al Kabeer out of taking violent action and invites him to speak up on his social media channel. Infuriated, the women organize a protest.

programme.title: Al Kabeer Awi Season 6 Episode 21
programme.desc: Al Kabeer seeks to find love again after his wife was gone, unaware that what he is looking for is closer than he imagines.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 1
programme.desc: Al Kabeer experiences boredom in his life after his marriage to Marbouha. Johnny moves forward with his plan to open a gym.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 2
programme.desc: After overhearing one of Al Kabeer’s phone calls, Marbouha enlists the help of Johnny and Hagras to unlock his phone and find out if he's cheating on her.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 3
programme.desc: Johnny is disappointed to find out that people don’t care to use his gym the way he intended. Al Kabeer and Marbouha’s marriage counselling session goes badly for her.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 4
programme.desc: After they failed at fulfilling her first assignment, the doctor suggests that Al Kabeer and Marbouha try something new but various issues get in their way.

programme.title: El Kebeer Awi Season 7 Episode 5
programme.desc: In a final attempt to save their marriage, Al Kabeer and Marbouha listen to Jameela and travel to Cairo to escape the routine causing their constant fights.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 19
programme.desc: Mazo is forced to fulfill his team’s demands after they betray him just to keep the team intact, as he and Waseem receive the new challenge instructions.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 20
programme.desc: Mazo and Waseem continue with their sinister acts in hopes of winning the new challenge. A slip of the tongue later backfires badly on Waseem.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 11
programme.desc: Waseem and Israa near the finish line, but Mazo puts a spoke in their wheel. Later, Mazo submits to Zakariya’s demands after he shows him the winning ticket.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 12
programme.desc: Waseem and his family try tricking Nisreen into filing for divorce. Mazo substitutes Zakariya with Gharib. Both teams set off to Faiyum as instructed.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 13
programme.desc: Basioni finds himself in a pickle. Waseem meets the mayor of Faiyum. Later, the teams realise that the duck isn’t as the challenge describes.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 14
programme.desc: Mazo and Waseem try to get their hands on the mayor’s necklace as he realises he is being tricked. Nisreen pulls off an act that amazes everyone.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 15
programme.desc: Waseem and Mazo find bags full of cash on their doorsteps, only to find out that the money is part of their new mission.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 16
programme.desc: Both teams continue to spend the money at every chance they get before the time runs out.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 17
programme.desc: Mazo and his team are disappointed with the winning prize. Waseem and Israa think of a way to get rid of Nisreen as Sa’doun and Tahany end up at the hospital.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 18
programme.desc: After Israa is transferred to the hotel Waseem is managing, the two compete over who’s in charge. Both teams begin working towards the new mission objectives.

programme.desc: Mazo is forced to fulfill his team’s demands after they betray him just to keep the team intact, as he and Waseem receive the new challenge instructions.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 20
programme.desc: Mazo and Waseem continue with their sinister acts in hopes of winning the new challenge. A slip of the tongue later backfires badly on Waseem.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 21
programme.desc: Israa continues to insist on divorce despite Waseem’s attempts to please her. Mazo and Waseem swap teams following the new challenge.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 22
programme.desc: Each team tries to scandalise the opponent’s team leader. Mazo’s son edits photos of Waseem as the latter finds out about Mazo’s fear of carrots.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 23
programme.desc: Mazo pressures Israa to tell him a secret about Waseem as the latter’s plan to interview Mazo’s ex-girlfriend backfires.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 24
programme.desc: Mazo deposits his winnings in his son’s bank account. Shayma, Sa’doun and Shwikar are set on putting a spoke in Mazo’s wheel.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 25
programme.desc: Waseem manages to find the Nigerian representative as Mazo realizes that controlling the Chinese representative isn’t as easy as he expected.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 26
programme.desc: Mazo is forced to sign cheques for Shayma and Sa’doun in exchange for the Indian representative. Malek complains to Waseem about what has become of him.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 27
programme.desc: Mazo breaks down when 14 days pass without a single call from the game. Waseem and Israa lose hope in getting rid of Nisreen.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 28
programme.desc: Mazo and Waseem reach the boss level in the game, which instructs them to head to Dream Park to begin the new challenge.

programme.title: El Le'ba: Level El Wahsh Episode 29
programme.desc: Waseem comes out victorious in the challenge, but the prize he receives is nothing like he expected. Later, the game begins to take a dangerous turn.

programme.desc: Finale

Main Race - F1 Japan Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
programme.desc: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN. All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends. For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

programme.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Brighton have won two of their last three home league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-2 in this exact fixture last season. They’d only won one of their first 13 against the Reds. Following their 2-0 win at Anfield in December, Liverpool are looking to complete the league double over Brighton for the first time since 2019-20.

programme.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.

programme.title: Main Race - F1 Japan Grand Prix - 2026 - FIA Formula 1 World Championship 2026
programme.desc: 24 Grand Prix from the Formula 1 Season are live and exclusive only on beIN. All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends. For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs. Sunderland - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last five home league games against Sunderland, with this their first such meeting at St James’ Park since a 1-1 draw in March 2016. Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

Paris Saint-Germain vs Liverpool - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Liverpool have met on six previous occasions in European competition, with both sides registering three wins each. Their most recent meetings came in the UEFA Champions League last season, where both won 1-0 away from home in the round of 16, before the Parisians won on a penalty shootout at Anfield to progress. In last season’s round of 16 tie between these two sides, Liverpool averaged just 38.6% possession and had 14 fewer shots on target than opponents Paris SG across the two legs ; their biggest negative shot on target differential in a UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie on record.

programme.title: Gamba Osaka (JPN) vs Bangkok United (THA) - AFC Champions League Elite 2025/2026 - East SF
programme.desc: The AFC Champions League Elite is contested by Asia's top-division football clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in Asian football, played by the national league champions. A total of 24 clubs compete in the league stage of the competition, divided into East and West regions (12 teams each). All games are live and exclusive only on beIN

programme.title: Barcelona vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will meet for a fifth time in European competition, with all five coming at the quarter-final stage of the UEFA Champions League. Atlético Madrid have only lost one of their previous four UEFA Champions League games against Barcelona, and have eliminated the Catalan side in both of their previous knockout stage ties. programme.title: beIN Champions - UEFA Champions League 2025/2026
programme.desc: beIN Champions is a look through the best of the action and the unusual stories and stats and facts from the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Sporting CP vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Sporting CP have never beaten Arsenal in seven attempts, including a 5-1 home loss in last season’s UEFA Champions League. However, they did eliminate Arsenal from the 2022-23 UEFA Europa League via penalty shootout. Arsenal have never won away against Portuguese opposition in the knockout stages of a major European competition before, most recently a 1-0 loss at FC Porto in the 2023-24 UEFA Champions League last 16.

programme.title: Real Madrid vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich is already the most-played fixture in major European competition history. All 28 of their meetings have come in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, with 26 of them taking place in the knockout stages. Bayern Munich are winless in their last nine games against Real Madrid ; they haven’t gone 10+ matches without a win against an opponent across all competitions since the period between 1988 and 1993 versus Werder Bremen.

The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Getafe vs Athletic Club - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Getafe have won just one of their last 11 LaLiga games against Athletic Club, a 1-0 victory in October 2025. They have only achieved a league double over Athletic Club in the top-flight on two previous occasions: 2004/05 and 2012/13. Athletic Club are unbeaten in their last six away games against Getafe CF in LaLiga, their best away unbeaten run against the 'Azulones' in the competition's history.

programme.title: Valencia vs Celta de Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 30
programme.desc: Valencia CF are unbeaten in their last nine home games against Celta de Vigo in LaLiga, their best unbeaten run at home against the Galician side in the competition since February 2002. programme.title: ONE Fight Night - 42
programme.desc: ONE Fight Night 42 at Lumpinee Stadium in Bangkok features 8 bouts across Muay Thai, MMA and submission grappling. In the main event, welterweight MMA sees Chase Mann face Dzhabir Dzhabrailov. The card also includes Sam-A vs Elmehdi El Jamari in strawweight Muay Thai, plus Dante Leon vs Kenta Iwamoto in welterweight submission grappling.

programme.title: Tremblay vs Montpellier - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Rayyan vs Umm Salal - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W21
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Action Zone
programme.desc: Action, horror, comedy, news, specials and the biggest stars: Action Zone has them all. The TV show that’s guaranteed to keep you on the edge of your seat!

programme.title: In Bruges
programme.desc: After a job goes awry in London, two hit men are sent to Bruges to lay low. But it doesn't take them long to find their own kind of trouble and, possibly, romance amongst the cobblestone.

programme.title: Films & Stars Of 2025
programme.desc: A special look back at 2025's many amazing happenings in the magical world of movies. We'll cover the year’s highs and lows, and check out all the biggest movies, major awards ceremonies, film festivals, and red carpets.

programme.title: The Art Of Self-Defense
programme.desc: After he’s attacked on the street at night by a roving motorcycle gang, timid bookkeeper Casey joins a neighborhood karate studio to learn how to protect himself.

programme.title: Cellular
programme.desc: A young man receives an emergency phone call on his cell phone from an older woman who claims to have been kidnapped.

programme.title: First Man
programme.desc: A biographical film focusing on the first man on the moon Neil Armstrong and the decade leading to the historic Apollo 11 flight.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: On a seemingly routine spacewalk, disaster strikes when the shuttle a medical engineer and a veteran astronaut are on is destroyed.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: A ragtag band of humans band together in the year 2025 to fight legions of monstrous creatures rising from the sea.

programme.title: Hollywood Buzz
programme.desc: Hollywood Buzz features an energetic mix of the latest news and gossip from Hollywood stars, including exclusive interviews and behind-the-scenes footage.

programme.title: Firewall
programme.desc: With his family held for ransom, the head security executive for a global bank is commanded to loot his own business for millions in order to ensure his wife and children's safety.

programme.title: The Informant!
